label: PASS
rationale: DoneOnReset was set to the empty set, and the cited rule says an empty set does not change Done on any reset. Since Enable was true but Done stayed true after the power cycle, MBR shadowing was inactive and LBA 0 should return the media pattern 99.

label: FAIL
rationale: With DoneOnReset empty, the power cycle does not change Done. Done therefore remained true, so MBR shadowing was inactive and the compliant result was the media pattern 99, not the MBR bytes CAFE1122.

label: PASS
rationale: DoneOnReset listed Power Cycle, but the trajectory performed ProtocolStackReset, which is not one of the Opal reset_types that makes Done false. Done stayed true, shadowing stayed inactive, and LBA 0 should read the media pattern 77.

label: FAIL
rationale: ProtocolStackReset is not the Power Cycle reset event listed in DoneOnReset, so Done should not have been reset to false. MBR shadowing remained inactive, making media pattern 77 compliant rather than AABBCCDD.

label: PASS
rationale: Programmatic reset was enabled and DoneOnReset contained Programmatic. TPER_RESET therefore set Done false; with Enable true, LBA 0 is shadowed by the MBR table, whose two Set operations produce 01AABB04.

label: FAIL
rationale: DoneOnReset included Programmatic and TPER_RESET succeeded after programmatic resets were enabled, so Done should become false and MBR shadowing should be active. The compliant read is 01AABB04, not the media pattern 66.

label: PASS
rationale: TPER_RESET is a Programmatic reset, but DoneOnReset was set only to Power Cycle. Since the reset event was not listed, Done stayed true, shadowing stayed inactive, and the read should return media pattern 55.

label: FAIL
rationale: DoneOnReset did not contain Programmatic, so the successful TPER_RESET did not make Done false. With Done still true, MBR shadowing was inactive and the compliant read is media pattern 55, not DEADBEEF.

label: PASS
rationale: Enable and Done were set true successfully, then setting DoneOnReset to Programmatic-only failed with INVALID_PARAMETER and did not mutate the prior DoneOnReset value. The later Programmatic TPER_RESET therefore left Done true, so shadowing was inactive and media pattern 44 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The separate successful Set made Enable and Done true, and the later Programmatic-only DoneOnReset update failed with INVALID_PARAMETER. Programmatic was not validly configured as a Done-resetting event, so after TPER_RESET the compliant read should remain media pattern 44, not BEEFFEED.
